rule_metadata.name: apt_equation_equationlaser_runtimeclasses
rule_metadata.description: Rule to detect the EquationLaser malware

rules.rule_text:
rule apt_equation_equationlaser_runtimeclasses
{
	meta:
		copyright = "Kaspersky Lab"
		description = "Rule to detect the EquationLaser malware"
		version = "1.0"
		last_modified = "2015-02-16"
		reference = "http://securelist.com/blog/research/68750/equation-the-death-star-of-malware-galaxy/"

	strings:
		$a1 = "?a73957838_2@@YAXXZ"
		$a2 = "?a84884@@YAXXZ"
		$a3 = "?b823838_9839@@YAXXZ"
		$a4 = "?e747383_94@@YAXXZ"
		$a5 = "?e83834@@YAXXZ"
		$a6 = "?e929348_827@@YAXXZ"

	condition:
		any of them
}
